typical_relief_triggers: Scene Clear title cards after boss defeats
Transition between different play styles (beat-em-up to vehicle sections)
typical_tension_triggers: Packed enemy encounters in beat-em-up sections
Vehicle driving segments with oncoming enemy fire
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Varies by level type - beat-em-up sections emphasize sustained combat tension, while vehicle sections introduce fast-paced evasion rhythm

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces beat-em-up mechanics with manageable enemy density in side-scrolling sections
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Shifts between combat styles; introduces vehicle sequences (Batmobile) requiring new control patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalates enemy difficulty in beat-em-up sections; water-based vehicle combat (Batskiboat) adds environmental variation
notable_spikes: Catwoman first encounter - scripted multi-phase boss with distinctive defeat sequence
Introduction of Batmobile segments - control scheme divergence from beat-em-up
High difficulty noted in certain Genesis/Game Gear versions on comparable levels

notable_level_patterns.description: Single levels combine side-scrolling beat-em-up combat with specialized sections (throwing-based gameplay, vehicle driving) to maintain variety and prevent mechanical fatigue
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mixed stages utilizing both Batmobile and Batskiboat segments

notable_level_patterns.description: Major villain encounters (particularly Catwoman) feature choreographed defeat sequences with region-specific directional framing (Scene Clear before defeat animation in western versions, reverse in Japanese)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Catwoman encounter - shows narrative progression through defeat staging

notable_level_patterns.description: Driving/boat sequences serve as rhythmic breaks from sustained beat-em-up combat while maintaining action through targeting and evasion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Batmobile and Batskiboat sections interspersed through campaign

sources_used: wikipedia - List of video games featuring Batman
